title: Simple Saturation Shader
description: Adds a simple slider which allows you to change saturation
body:
**A very light shader pack for Iris that adds a saturation slider, to allow you to change the saturation of your game**

![Showcase of saturation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa6660c423f51f4a8ebc5645bc0b2b2756e7d4ba_0.webp)

The sliders vary from:

"0.0 0.05 0.10 0.15 0.20 0.25 0.30 0.35 0.40 0.45 0.50 0.55 0.60 0.65 0.70 0.75 0.80 0.85 0.90 0.95 1.0 1.05 1.10 1.15 1.20 1.25 1.30 1.35 1.40 1.45 1.50 1.55 1.60 1.65 1.70 1.75 1.80 1.85 1.90 1.95 2.0 3.0 100" 

With 1 being normal saturation, 0 being none and 100 being max.

This shader pack was made by MrBrose, with help from RJ_Infinity

Base code based off of "Base-Shader" by Bestsoft100
https://modrinth.com/shader/base-shader
